title: rootless: fix usage of create --pod=new:FOO
body:
some fixes that enable using `--pod=new:FOO` with rootless containers

Closes: https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/2124

comments.body: LGTM, reminds me that the varlink endpoint probably needs fix too.
